title: pokey and alexe's mod
description: adds ~70 crafting recipes, 8 sets of armor, and 5 food items in this mod 8 of the crafting recipe was in the old Minecraft and more are coming soon  this mod modifies your game for the better.  You can add this to your mod pack but credit this page.
body:
server testing hasn't been tested yet

recommended mods: Jei,optifine 

adds 49 crafting recipes, 8 sets of armor, and 5 food items in this mod 8 of the crafting recipe was in the old Minecraft and more are coming soon

this mod modifies your game for the better.

You can add this to your mod pack but credit this page.

 armor sets: dripstone, cobblestone, tungsten, reinforced tungsten, leafy, wood, potato (cooked/raw)

 

what they do/are for:

dripstone and cobblestone armor: starter armor sets are weaker than iron but more robust than gold and leather.

tungsten and reinforced tungsten armor: more of a late-game set considering it takes a pigstep disc and 4 copper ingots to make one.

cooked/raw potato armor: more of a meme armor only really useful if you have too many potatoes or a booming potato farm

leafy/wood armor: leafy has more knockback resistance as leaves are manly soft wood armor is more if you have a booming tree farm and nothing to build (both can be repaired with either any leaf or log respectively)

 

Credits:

programs used: block bench v4.5.1, gimp 2.10, Mcreator 2022.3, TLancher v2.86

people: me (Pokey_yt) 
new mod planned soon
